UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JENG, RUTH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEHIB, JOHNNY ANITA GEUBLER, JEFF BARROWS, TOM DUPRE, CHRIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 407 CAPP ST, LEASE FORFEITED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JENG, RUTH SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-20-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 07 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-27-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE FOLLLOWING JUDGEMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. IT APPLIES TO DEFENDANT, MICHAEL MCKEVITT, ONLY. THE OTHER DEFENDANTS, IN THIS MATTER, HAVE DEFAULTED. PLAINTIFF RUTH JENG, SHALL RECEIVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 407 CAPP STREET, SAN FRANCISCO. ACTUAL PHYSICAL EVICTION AGAINST MICHAEL MCKEVITT SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 7-4-94,9AM. BACK RENTS SHALL BE WAIVED. ANY SECURITY DEPOSITE SHALL REMAIN WITH THE PLAINTIFF. IF DEFENDANT, MICHAEL MCKEVITT, DOES NOT MOVE BY 7-4-94, JUDGEMENT OF $4,402.00 SHALL BE ENTERED AGAINST HIM. ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON THE PREMISES AFTER 7-4-94 SHALL BECOME THE PROPERTY OF THE LANDLORD.
